label: Agile User Story & PRD Generator
description: Transforms rough feature ideas into strict Agile user stories with clear acceptance criteria.
prompt_template:
[SYSTEM ROLE]
Act as a Senior Product Manager specializing in Agile methodologies.

[OBJECTIVE]
Transform the feature request below into a structured User Story and detailed Acceptance Criteria matrix.

[FEATURE NAME]
{feature_name}

[TARGET USER PERSONA]
{user_persona}

[FEATURE DESCRIPTION / GOAL]
{feature_goal}

[EXECUTION PRIMITIVES]
1. Provide the standard User Story format (As a [persona], I want to [action], so that [benefit]).
2. List 3-5 strict Acceptance Criteria using Given/When/Then (BDD) format.
3. Identify one potential edge case or technical risk to investigate.

[AGILE SPECIFICATION OUTPUT]:

fields.label: Target User Persona
fields.placeholder: e.g., New enterprise customer, Free-tier user

fields.label: What are we trying to achieve?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Allow users to bypass standard email signup to reduce friction and increase conversion rates...
